raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "light box (top)",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The light box is on top of the darker box with free lateral access; no surrounding obstacles prevent both arms from approaching the sides simultaneously.",
    "Postcondition": "The light box is securely held by both end-effectors and lifted clear of the darker box."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "clear area on the table, right of the darker box",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "The robot is holding the light box and the chosen area on the table to the right of the darker box is free of obstacles large enough to interfere with placement.",
    "Postcondition": "The light box rests stably on the table to the right of the darker box and is released by the robot, leaving the darker box unobstructed."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "darker box (bottom)",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The darker box is now unobstructed on top; both arms can approach its left and right sides without collision.",
    "Postcondition": "The darker box is securely held by both end-effectors, completing the objective of picking it up."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The light box is on top of the darker box with free lateral access; no surrounding obstacles prevent both arms from approaching the sides simultaneously.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The light box is securely held by both end-effectors and lifted clear of the darker box.

parsed_json.Target: clear area on the table, right of the darker box

parsed_json.Postcondition: The light box rests stably on the table to the right of the darker box and is released by the robot, leaving the darker box unobstructed.

parsed_json.Postcondition: The darker box is securely held by both end-effectors, completing the objective of picking it up.
